name: Trevi Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Trevi Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing Haduvio (oral nalbuphine ER) for the treatment of chronic cough in patients with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), non-IPF interstitial lung disease (ILD), and refractory chronic cough (RCC). The company has retained worldwide commercial rights for Haduvio and relies on contract manufacturers for drug substance and product supply.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of the investigational therapy Haduvio (oral nalbuphine ER) for the treatment of chronic cough in patients with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis, or IPF, non-IPF interstitial lung disease, or non-IPF ILD, and refractory chronic cough, or RCC.

catalysts.event: Initiate first Phase 3 trial for IPF-related chronic cough
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 3 trials will run in parallel, and we remain on track to initiate the first Phase 3 trial in the second quarter of 2026 and the second Phase 3 trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate second Phase 3 trial for IPF-related chronic cough
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 3 trials will run in parallel, and we remain on track to initiate the first Phase 3 trial in the second quarter of 2026 and the second Phase 3 trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2b trial for non-IPF ILD-related chronic cough
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate an adaptive design Phase 2b clinical trial for the treatment of patients with non-IPF ILD-related chronic cough in the second half of 2026, subject to review of the protocol for the trial by the FDA.

We expect to initiate a Phase 2b trial of Haduvio for the treatment of patients with RCC in the second quarter of 2026, which we are planning to conduct in the United Kingdom, Canada, and possibly other European countries.
We expect to complete this study in mid-2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 150,000 U.S. patients with IPF, with two-thirds having uncontrolled chronic cough.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 150,000 U.S. patients with IPF, and two-thirds of these patients have uncontrolled chronic cough.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 228,000 adults in the U.S. with non-IPF ILD, and up to 50%-60% suffer from uncontrolled chronic cough.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 228,000 adults in the U.S. and greater than 1 million adults worldwide are believed to have ILDs other than IPF.

tamClaims.claim: RCC affects approximately 2-3 million adults in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: RCC affects approximately 2-3 million adults in the U.S. and is related to biological changes in the central and peripheral nervous systems that lower the threshold of the cough reflex.
